pages.title: Blacksmith
pages.text: Craft primary. Generic melee weapons. Twenty-five items.$(br2)Paladin big-melee and Rogues utility blades at iron / gold / diamond tiers, plus four un-paired fantasy blades.

pages.title: Paladin melee (9)
pages.text: $(bold)Claymore, Mace, Great Hammer.$(/) Three weapons across three tiers — iron, gold, diamond.$(br2)Standard pattern: matching metal-block forte and head, chain-wrapped haft.

pages.title: Rogue utility blades (12)
pages.text: $(bold)Dagger, Double Axe, Glaive, Sickle.$(/) Four weapons across three tiers — iron, gold, diamond.

pages.title: Fantasy blades (4)
pages.text: $(li)$(bold)Sharp Curved Sword$(/) — pirate cutlass.$(li)$(bold)Fog Guard Sword$(/) — misty-knight theme.$(li)$(bold)Dragonslayer Halberd$(/).$(li)$(bold)Spark of Dawn Polearm$(/) — radiant theme.$(br)Netherite, aeternium, and ruby variants stay vanilla smithing upgrades.$(br2)Matching trader: the Blacksmith.
